name: Cassondra Roberts
cover:
I'm writing to express my interest in joining your team. With 12+ years of experience leading design systems & frontend architecture at scale, I bring a unique combination of technical depth, strategic thinking, & collaborative leadership.

At Adobe, I served as Staff Design Engineer for Spectrum, leading strategic technical direction for a design system serving flagship products used by millions. I balanced big-picture vision with attention to implementation details, mentored team members through active code reviews, & fostered a culture of technical excellence. I explored how AI can enhance developer workflows, leading initiatives that improved productivity & code quality. My work on accessibility (WCAG AA) & cross-platform implementations addressed challenges at both current & future scale.

At Red Hat, I founded & led PatternFly Elements, an open source design system that drove adoption across Red Hat & partner organizations. I broke down complex problems into actionable solutions, collaborated with cross-functional teams including Google, IBM, Fidelity, & Penn State, & successfully advocated for design system goals. My platform stewardship work built distributed theming architecture enabling consistent experiences across disparate applications.

As a W3C CSS Working Group member, I've influenced web platform standards & represented organizational priorities at the standards level. I'm passionate about building infrastructure that empowers teams to ship faster, creating tools that help teams succeed, & fostering environments where technical excellence thrives.

I'm excited about the opportunity to bring my experience in design systems, accessibility, AI-enhanced workflows, & cross-functional collaboration to your team. I'd welcome the chance to discuss how my background aligns with your needs.
about: Front-end engineer with 12+ years building scalable web applications & design systems that enable rapid experimentation & growth. W3C CSS Working Group member & open source leader with proven ability to drive adoption, optimize conversion, & collaborate across organizational boundaries. Deep expertise in building infrastructure that empowers teams to ship faster. Passionate about data-driven development, user-focused design, & creating tools that help teams succeed.

experience.title: Consultant & Owner
experience.summary: Launched consulting practice focused on helping teams build scalable web experiences & design systems that accelerate product development.
highlights: Help teams deliver web experiences at scale that accelerate product development
Leveraging AI tools (Cursor, Claude) to maximize productivity & code quality

experience.title: Staff Design Engineer, Spectrum Design System
experience.summary: Led frontend architecture & AI integration for Adobe's design system, serving flagship products (Photoshop, Illustrator) used by millions. Drove technical decisions that enabled teams to ship features faster while maintaining quality & consistency.
highlights: Technical leader for web components styling: conducted thorough code reviews, ensuring accessibility (WCAG AA) & design fidelity
Modernized & refactored Spectrum CSS tooling & documentation, significantly reducing technical debt
Led Spectrum AI Working Group: established Cursor guidelines & built AI-assisted workflow that converted engineer descriptions into sprint-ready tickets
Represented Adobe in W3C CSS Working Group, directly influencing web platform standards to meet product team priorities

experience.title: Principal Front-end Architect, User Experience
experience.summary: Open source leader & technical architect for PatternFly Elements, driving adoption across Red Hat & partner organizations. Led community of contributors while collaborating with major tech companies on shared standards.
highlights: Founded & grew PatternFly Elements open source community: managed roadmap, facilitated contributions, & drove adoption across Red Hat & external organizations
Increased component adoption by engaging designers, developers, & stakeholders to prioritize high-impact features based on user needs
Cross-organization collaboration with Google, IBM, Fidelity, & Penn State: aligned on shared patterns & drove standardization across enterprise applications
Active CSS Working Group & web components standards contributor: represented Red Hat's priorities & influenced platform direction
Built distributed component theming architecture enabling consistent branding across disparate applications
Community management: responded to issues, reviewed code, wrote documentation, & fostered healthy, positive contributor culture
